mapper.select:
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, is_builtin, status, sort, created_at FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0
AND (role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sort ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, role_name, role_code FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
